description_long: This tall skyscraper features a modern, rectangular design with a prominent vertical emphasis created by dark-tinted window strips running the full height of the building. The facade is primarily composed of light-colored concrete or stone, accented by horizontal balcony elements and brown-toned architectural details. A distinctive feature is the elevated outdoor swimming pool with surrounding palm trees, located on a lower podium section that juts out from one side of the building. The uppermost floors are set back slightly, creating a tiered effect and providing rooftop terrace spaces. The windows are arranged in regular vertical bands, and the building's overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation. No visible signage or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A modern, high-rise skyscraper with vertical window bands, a light facade, and an elevated pool terrace with palm trees. The design is sleek and contemporary, featuring tiered upper floors and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the skyscraper with the elevated pool terrace and palm trees, as well as the vertical window bands and light facade.
description_view_1: This view shows the main facade with symmetrical vertical window strips and brown balcony accents, emphasizing the building's height and modern design.
description_view_2: This angle displays the opposite side of the pool terrace, with the pool and palm trees visible on the right, and the vertical window pattern continuing up the facade.
description_view_3: This view centers on the pool terrace at the base, showing the full width of the pool and the symmetrical arrangement of the building's facade above.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features light-colored concrete or stone panels with vertical strips of dark-tinted glass windows and brown balcony accents. The design is clean and geometric, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on verticality.
